title: Conversational Designer / Prompt UX Designer
description: Narrative AI is building conversational AI agents for mental wellness — empathetic AI companions that can have meaningful, supportive conversations with users. We need a Conversational Designer / Prompt UX Designer who understands how to design for emotional intelligence, trust, and safety in AI conversations.
responsibilities: Design the conversational flow and tone for our wellness AI agents — ensuring conversations feel natural, empathetic, and safe
Write and iterate prompt templates that shape agent responses toward therapeutic best practices
Create tone and voice guidelines for our agents — defining personality, empathy level, and communication boundaries
Conduct conversation testing sessions to evaluate agent responses for appropriateness, helpfulness, and emotional resonance
Collaborate with clinical advisors to ensure agent conversations align with evidence-based wellness practices
Build a conversation pattern library — reusable dialogue templates for common scenarios (stress, anxiety, goal-setting, etc.)
requirements: 3+ years of conversation design, UX writing, or interaction design experience
Strong portfolio of conversational products — chatbots, voice assistants, or AI companions
Deep understanding of conversation design principles — pacing, empathy, escalation, and boundary-setting
Excellent writing skills — you can craft conversational microcopy that feels human
Understanding of AI limitations — you know where agents succeed and where they break down
Sensitive to ethical considerations in AI design — especially around mental health and vulnerable users
niceTo_have: Background in counseling, psychology, or healthcare (not required but a strong plus)
Experience with therapeutic conversation frameworks (CBT, motivational interviewing, etc.)
Published work on conversational AI or UX writing
Experience designing for safety-critical AI applications
